_comment: Per-source freshness map used by DataFreshnessIndicator. Matches doc 07 §26 DataStatus schema. v2 (2026-05-29): expanded to 7-source list aligned with doc 02 §9 Data Source Registry — replaces the iter-3 5-source placeholder. Two sources carry explicit caveats this cycle: (i) Yahoo:GC=F is a SUBSTITUTE for the retired FRED LBMA gold series (methodology drift D-gold-2026-05-29 in message), (ii) CoinGlass:ETF is a PROVISIONAL single-source render (Farside the spec-canonical manual feed is bot-blocked, SoSoValue Cloudflare-blocked, so no cross-check). Both surface as DELAYED with the nuance in the message field per doc 02 §10. This file and apps/web/data/market/regime.json#data_status MUST list the same source set (audit gate).

sources.message: BTC monthly price series spliced (CoinMetrics 2010-07 → 2014-08; Yahoo 2014-09 onwards). Authoritative for BTC structural signals (BTC-01..04); last confirmed monthly close April 30, 2026 per doc 02 §5.1. Next update due at May 31 monthly close.
Trade-weighted broad-dollar index used per doc 02 §9 (DXY proxy; license-free alternative to ICE DXY).
Monthly liquidity series; April 2026 reading is the latest available release. Next monthly release expected mid-May (typical FRED M2SL cadence).

Methodology drift D-gold-2026-05-29: spec primary FRED GOLDAMGBD228NLBM (LBMA AM fix) and GOLDPMGBD228NLBM (LBMA PM fix) both returned 404 — FRED retired the LBMA series. Yahoo GC=F (front-month gold futures) substituted. Result direction for REL-01 (ratio-vs-EMA-of-self) is robust to the substitute. Replacement canonical source tracked in PENDING_ALL.md 5.29.

PROVISIONAL single-source — CoinGlass /etf/bitcoin daily-flows table browser-rendered via Docker MCP (2026-05-29). SoSoValue cross-check unreachable (Cloudflare-blocked). Spec-canonical Farside manual feed remains the authoritative source per doc 02 §8.3 + doc 06 §6.5 — not used here (bot-blocked, policy forbids evasion). Visible window: trailing ~10 trading days (May 15 — May 29). Of the trailing 4 weekly aggregates anchored at the May 22 confirmed Friday close: week ending May 22 confirmed net-negative (-16.3K BTC, 5/5 days outflows); weeks ending May 15 / May 8 / May 1 not visible on the default page without authenticated access. Current in-progress week (ending May 29) is tracking net-negative (-17.0K BTC through Thu, post-anchor so outside the trailing-4 window). ETF-01 evaluated INACTIVE 0/2 on the directional read across visible data; the more conservative §10.1 UNAVAILABLE read yields identical 0-pt scoring. Canonical Farside acquisition tracked in PENDING_ALL.md 5.28.
